calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Petitioner, Lorena Miranda present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Noah Gabriel Curiel-Miranda.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Reset To Mar-04-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Lorena Miranda present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the signature of the minor's father consenting to the petition and no proof of publication filed with the court.
This matter is continued to March 4, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for appearance by the minor's father and/or declaration/consent in an amended petition. Petitioner is also required to filed the proof of publication with the court.
